event_comments:
The Lost & Found box is overflowing; coats, more coats, water bottles, folding chair. PLEASE check that you have all your belongings from the event. Please label your stuff so we can more easily get it back to you.
The maps remaining from this event will be at the Info Tent at Green River College on Feb. 7, including the maps of the Middle School course that were collected at Putney Woods.
